PS C:\Users\Support> if (-not ($PSVersionTable.PSVersion)) { throw "WRONG SHELL: Run this in Windows PowerShell." }

PS C:\Users\Support> $ScriptDir = Join-Path $Root "scripts"
PS C:\Users\Support> $LogDir = Join-Path $Root "logs"
PS C:\Users\Support> $Stamp = Get-Date -Format "yyyyMMdd-HHmmss"
PS C:\Users\Support> $PsLog = Join-Path $LogDir "oc-ref-venice-auth-repair-proof-$Stamp.log"
PS C:\Users\Support> $BashScript = Join-Path $ScriptDir "oc-ref-venice-auth-repair-proof-$Stamp.sh"

PS C:\Users\Support> $Bash = @'
>> #!/usr/bin/env bash
>> set -Eeuo pipefail
>> set +H
>>
>> INSTALL_ROOT="$HOME/openclaw-install"
>> LOG_DIR="$INSTALL_ROOT/logs"
>> STATE_DIR="$INSTALL_ROOT/state"
>> OUT_DIR="$INSTALL_ROOT/model-proof"
>> STAMP="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
>> LOG_FILE="$LOG_DIR/oc-ref-venice-auth-repair-proof-$STAMP.log"
>>
>> mkdir -p "$LOG_DIR" "$STATE_DIR" "$OUT_DIR"
>> exec > >(tee -a "$LOG_FILE") 2>&1
>>
>> echo "START OC-REF VENICE AUTH REPAIR AND MODEL PROOF"
>> echo "whoami=$(whoami)"
>> echo "hostname=$(hostname)"
>> echo "home=$HOME"
>> echo "log=$LOG_FILE"
>>
>> export PATH="/opt/openclaw/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH"
>>
>> fail() {
>>   echo ""
>>   echo "OC-REF VENICE AUTH REPAIR AND MODEL PROOF FAILED"
>>   echo "Reason=$1"
>>   echo "Log=$LOG_FILE"
>>   false
>> }
>>
